messages.content: === CRON JOB STATUS === 17 total: 13 OK (76%), 4 errors (24%). Critical: Revenue Tracker rate_limit 2, Auto-Route rate_limit 2, self-improvement-cycle main 402 billing 16, self-improvement-cycle dup 402 16. Recovering: Money Machine 2, Market Scan 2, Quantum Sweep 2. === REVENUE CIRCUITS === Actual $10.04 ($0.05 api_sale + $9.99 content_sale). Projected $1.8M/day theoretical. Status: circuits ACTIVE but payment DISCONNECTED. Money Machine rate_limited recovering. Revenue Tracker OK. Full Stack OK. Orchestrators ACTIVE. Payment blockade: Gumroad not live, Ko-fi bank unlinked, PayPal not activated. Gap: Ledger exists but no API calls to payment processors. === ERRORS LAST HOUR === 1) rate_limit (GitHub Models quota) affecting 4-6 jobs, 1-2 consecutive; expected 22:00 UTC reset. 2) billing_402 (Kilo AI embedding API) affecting self-improvement-cycle (16 consecutive); memory_search tool disabled. System Health: 76%. === KEY DECISIONS === 1) Phase 6 billing error identified (Kilo AI 402). 2) EVEZ split-brain >11h P0. 3) Config decay fixed at 18:18 UTC. 4) Monitoring tier restored. 5) Revenue triad mixed (Full Stack OK, Revenue Tracker OK, Money Machine degraded). 6) Auto-route detection-only gap P0. 7) File-first memory validated. 8) Deduplication gap found. 9) Payment blockade independent compound layer. 10) Recovery sequence mapped. === PHASES === Phase 1-5 resolved, Phase 6 active. === SPEEDRUN === Quantum Sweep 2hr->4hr, Auto-Route 45min->60min, Revenue Loop 22.5min->60min. Effectiveness PARTIAL; risk of reconvergence. === P0 ACTIONS === Steven: 1) Resolve Kilo AI billing, 2) Restart EVEZ Studio, 3) Connect payments. Auto: 1) Money Machine recovery (~22:00 UTC), 2) Implement cron automation, 3) Deploy rate_limiter.py. Timeline: 2-4 days parallel, 5-7 sequential.
